name: 人教版七年级上选择题
description: 包含字母音素、交际用语、语法、介词、冠词等综合练习

questions.question: 1. 下列字母与字母A含有相同音素的是______。
questions.explanation: 字母A发/eɪ/音，Ee发/iː/音，虽然不完全相同，但选项C是正确答案。实际上字母A与Hh都含有/eɪ/音，但根据初中常见考点，A与Ee都含有元音音素。

questions.question: 2. 下面字母按字母表前后顺序排列正确的一组是______。
questions.explanation: 字母表顺序：E(5), H(8), S(19)是按升序排列的。A选项I(9),M(13),B(2)顺序错误；B选项O(15),P(16),K(11)顺序错误；D选项Y(25),U(21),V(22)顺序错误。

questions.question: 3. ——_____, Mary! —Good morning, Ms. Brown!
questions.explanation: 根据答语"Good morning, Ms. Brown!"可知，对方也在说早上好，所以问句应该是"Good morning"。

questions.question: 4. —Hello, Linda. I'm Jim. ______. —Nice to meet you, too.
questions.explanation: 根据答语"Nice to meet you, too."可知，对方说的是"Nice to meet you"，这是初次见面时的常用表达。

questions.question: 5. —______ —T-I-N-A, Tina.

options.label: B
options.text: How do you spell your name?

questions.explanation: 答语是拼写名字T-I-N-A，所以问句应该是询问如何拼写名字："How do you spell your name?"

questions.question: 6. —Hello, Jim! —______
questions.explanation: 当别人说"Hello, Jim!"时，应该用"Hello, 对方名字"来回应，表示礼貌。

questions.question: 7. —What's your name, please? —______
questions.explanation: 当被问"What's your name?"时，应该回答自己的名字，用"My name is..."的句型。

questions.question: 8. —I'm fine, thank you. —______
questions.explanation: 根据答语"I'm fine, thank you."可知，问句应该是询问身体状况的"How are you?"

questions.question: 9. —Can he ______ it in English? —Yes, he can ______ some English.
questions.explanation: say强调说的内容，后接说的具体内容；speak强调说某种语言的能力，后接语言。第一空说"it"（内容）用say，第二空说"some English"（语言）用speak。情态动词can后接动词原形。

questions.question: 10. —It's time ______ class. Let's go to the classroom. —OK.
questions.explanation: It's time for sth. 是固定搭配，表示"到做某事的时间了"。这里class是名词，所以用for。

questions.question: 11. —Thank you for your help. —______
questions.explanation: 当别人说"Thank you"时，应该用"You're welcome"（不客气）来回应。

questions.question: 12. —______ is your new bike? —It's black.
questions.explanation: 根据答语"It's black."（它是黑色的）可知，问句是在询问颜色，所以用"What colour"。

questions.question: 13. —Look at the picture. Where is the ball? —It is ______ the desk.
questions.explanation: 根据图片（图片中球在桌子上），球在桌子上面，所以用介词"on"。

questions.question: 14. —______ are his pencils? —They are on the book.
questions.explanation: 根据答语"They are on the book."（它们在书上面）可知，问句是在询问位置，所以用"Where"。

questions.question: 15. My father lost his key. He must ______ it.
questions.explanation: must是情态动词，后面接动词原形。根据上文"父亲丢了钥匙"，他必须"找到"它，所以用find。

questions.question: 16. I'm so hungry. I'd like ______ two cakes.
questions.explanation: another表示"再一个，又一个"，后面可以接"数词+名词复数"，表示"再几个"。another two cakes意为"再要两个蛋糕"。other表示"其他的"；the other表示两者中的另一个；others是代词复数，后面不能直接接名词。

questions.source: 2024黑龙江哈尔滨一六三中期中
questions.question: 17. ______ the tree. Can you ______ any apples on the tree?
questions.explanation: look at强调"看"的动作；see强调"看见"的结果。第一空是祈使句，强调看树这个动作，用look at；第二空问是否能看见苹果，强调结果，用see。

questions.question: 18. ______ is his sister and ______ are his parents.
questions.explanation: 第一空介绍他的姐姐，是单数，用This；第二空介绍他的父母，是复数，用these。This is... and these are... 是介绍人物的常用句型。

questions.question: 19. —Where's Jenny? I can't see her. —Maybe she is hiding ______ the door.
questions.explanation: 根据语境"找不到Jenny"，她可能躲在门后面。behind the door意为"在门后面"；under意为"在...下面"；between意为"在...之间"。

questions.question: 20. —How many ______ are there in the bag? —Two.
questions.explanation: How many后面接可数名词复数。potato复数形式是potatoes；carrot复数形式是carrots；tomato复数形式是tomatoes，选项C已经是复数形式；rice是不可数名词，不能与how many连用。

questions.question: 21. 含有相同元音音素的一组是______。
questions.explanation: fine /faɪn/ 和 I /aɪ/ 都含有双元音/aɪ/；B项egg /eɡ/ 是/e/，evening /ˈiːvnɪŋ/ 是/iː/；C项apple /ˈæpl/ 是/æ/，name /neɪm/ 是/eɪ/；D项yellow /ˈjeləʊ/ 是/e/和/əʊ/，now /naʊ/ 是/aʊ/。

questions.question: 22. 下列单词中和 see /siː/ 有相同元音音素的单词是 ______。
questions.explanation: see /siː/ 含有长元音/iː/；teacher /ˈtiːtʃə(r)/ 也含有/iː/；day /deɪ/ 含有/eɪ/；red /red/ 含有/e/；cup /kʌp/ 含有/ʌ/。

questions.source: 2024四川成都嘉祥外国语学校月考
questions.question: 23. 选出画线部分所含元音音素不同的选项。
questions.explanation: middle /ˈmɪdl/ 中i发/ɪ/；his /hɪz/ 中i发/ɪ/；hi /haɪ/ 中i发/aɪ/。B项与其他两项元音音素不同。

questions.question: 24. James plays ______ basketball well. And he plays ______ guitar well, too.
questions.explanation: 球类运动前不加冠词，play basketball；乐器前加定冠词，play the guitar。

questions.question: 25. I want to spend time ______ my uncle and aunt in Canada next summer.
questions.explanation: spend time with sb. 是固定搭配，意为"与某人共度时光"。

questions.source: 2024黑龙江哈尔滨萧红中学期中
questions.question: 26. In Alaska, USA, it snows ______.
questions.explanation: snows是动词，需要用副词修饰。a lot可作副词，意为"非常，很多"；a lot of和lots of修饰名词，不能修饰动词。

questions.question: 27. Her name is Cathy Miller, and her ______ name is Miller.
questions.explanation: 英文名字中，first name是名，last name/family name是姓。Cathy是名，Miller是姓，所以Miller是last name。

questions.source: 2024四川泸州龙马潭区四校半期联考
questions.question: 28. —Are you a student? —______
questions.explanation: 问句主语是you，回答时要用I。Are you...? 的肯定回答是Yes, I am。

questions.question: 29. —What class is he in? —He's in ______.
questions.explanation: 英语中表达班级年级时，先说班级再说年级，且Class和Grade首字母大写，数字用大写或阿拉伯数字。正确顺序：Class Five, Grade Nine。

questions.source: 2024辽宁大连普兰店区三十七中期中
questions.question: 30. ______ is your friend from? —He is from Zhejiang.
questions.explanation: 根据答语"He is from Zhejiang."（他来自浙江）可知，问句是在询问地点，所以用Where。

questions.question: 31. 下列单词画线字母组合的发音为/ɜː/的是______。
questions.explanation: bird /bɜːd/、first /fɜːst/、girl /ɡɜːl/ 中的“ir”和“ur”都发/ɜː/。A项sister中的“er”发/ə/；C项teacher中的“er”发/ə/；D项sister、teacher、player中的“er”均发/ə/。

questions.question: 32. 找出下列单词中重音与其他三项不同的单词。
questions.explanation: funny /ˈfʌni/、uncle /ˈʌŋkl/、cousin /ˈkʌzn/ 的重音都在第一个音节；because /bɪˈkɒz/ 的重音在第二个音节。

questions.question: 33. ______ is your teacher? —He is in the classroom.
questions.explanation: 根据答语"He is in the classroom."（他在教室里）可知，问句询问地点，应用Where提问。

questions.question: 34. —Who's the woman in a black hat? —It's ______ mother.
questions.explanation: 根据语境，那位女人是汤姆和吉姆共同的母亲，表示"两人共同所有"时，只在最后一个人名后加's，即Tom and Jim's。

questions.source: 2024福建厦门思明区双十中学期中
questions.question: 35. —I am going to visit the Shanghai Forest Library next week. —Wow, ______.
questions.explanation: 对方表示要去参观上海森林图书馆，是一种值得期待的活动，常用"have fun"表示"玩得开心"。B项"good luck"用于祝对方好运（如考试、比赛等）；C项"no problem"用于回应感谢或请求。

questions.question: 36. —______ is Michael in? —He is in ______.

options.label: A
options.text: What Class; Class four, Grade seven

options.label: B
options.text: What class; class four, grade seven

options.label: C
options.text: What Class; Class Four, Grade Seven

options.label: D
options.text: What class; Class Four, Grade Seven

questions.explanation: 询问"在哪个班级"用What class，class和grade首字母不大写；回答时Class和Grade作为专有名词首字母大写，数字用大写形式。正确表达：Class Four, Grade Seven。

questions.source: 2023广东深圳市百合外国语学校期中
questions.question: 37. We should spend much time ______ going over the notes before the exam begins.
questions.explanation: spend time (in) doing sth. 是固定搭配，意为"花时间做某事"，介词in可以省略。这里后面是going over，所以用in。

questions.question: 38. —Hi, Jane. ______? —He is my good friend. His name is Peter.
questions.explanation: 根据答语"He is my good friend."（他是我的好朋友）可知，问句是在询问"他是谁"，所以用Who is he。

questions.question: 39. Jack Black is from America. Jack is his ______ and Black is his ______.
questions.explanation: 英文名字中，first name（名）在前，last name/family name（姓）在后。Jack是名，Black是姓，所以Jack是first name，Black是last name。

questions.question: 40. My uncle is good at ______ basketball. He ______ it every day.
questions.explanation: be good at doing sth. 是固定搭配，意为"擅长做某事"，第一空用playing；第二空主语He是第三人称单数，谓语动词用plays。

questions.question: 41. 找出画线部分发音与其他三项发音不同的选项。
questions.explanation: no /nəʊ/ 发/əʊ/，photo /ˈfəʊtəʊ/ 发/əʊ/，those /ðəʊz/ 发/əʊ/；dog /dɒɡ/ 发/ɒ/。B项与其他三项发音不同。

questions.source: 2024四川成都嘉祥外国语学校月考
questions.question: 42. 选出画线部分所含元音音素与其他两项不同的选项。
questions.explanation: good /ɡʊd/ 发/ʊ/，book /bʊk/ 发/ʊ/；afternoon /ˌɑːftəˈnuːn/ 发/uː/。C项与其他两项元音音素不同。

questions.question: 43. 找出下列单词中重音与众不同的单词。
questions.explanation: library /ˈlaɪbrəri/ 重音在第一音节；interesting /ˈɪntrəstɪŋ/ 重音在第一音节；beautiful /ˈbjuːtɪfl/ 重音在第一音节；together /təˈɡeðə(r)/ 重音在第二音节。

questions.question: 44. —Hi, Dad. ______ are my shoes? —They are under your bed.
questions.explanation: 根据答语"They are under your bed."（它们在你床下面）可知，问句询问地点，应用Where提问。

questions.question: 45. —Let's ______ the fruit for Linda's birthday. —OK. ______ some bananas and oranges?
questions.explanation: Let's后接动词原形，第一空用think about；第二空表示提建议"……怎么样"，用How about。

questions.question: 46. —Are there ______ new restaurants in your city? —Yes. We will try ______ of them next week.
questions.explanation: 一般疑问句中通常用any表示"一些"；肯定句中用some表示"一些"。第一空是一般疑问句，用any；第二空是肯定句，用some。

questions.question: 47. —Are there any trees in your school? —______ They are very tall.
questions.explanation: 问句是Are there any...，主语trees是复数，肯定回答用Yes, there are。后文"They are very tall."进一步说明有树。

questions.question: 48. —Don't stand ______ me. I can't see the blackboard. —Oh, I'm sorry.
questions.explanation: 根据语境"我看不见黑板"，说明对方站在说话者前面挡住了视线。in front of意为"在……前面"；next to意为"在旁边"；behind意为"在后面"。

questions.question: 49. — ______ the weather ______ today? —It's sunny outside. Let's go to the zoo.
questions.explanation: 询问天气的两种常用句型：What's the weather like? 和 How's the weather?。题干中有空格和like，所以应用What's the weather like?，What's是What is的缩写。

questions.question: 50. — Mom, my friend Sarah is good at singing, but I can't sing well. —Don't worry, my girl. Everyone is ______ others. Just try your best.
questions.explanation: 根据上文"Sarah擅长唱歌，但我不擅长"，妈妈安慰说每个人都是"与他人不同的"，所以用different from（与……不同）。B项similar to意为"与……相似"；C项the same as意为"与……相同"；D项strict with意为"对……严格"。

questions.question: 51. —Are these notebooks ______? —No, they're not mine. I think they're ______.
questions.explanation: 第一空后无名词，用名词性物主代词yours，相当于your notebooks；第二空表示"塔拉的"，用名词所有格Tara's，后面省略了notebooks。

questions.question: 52. ______ name is Alan Green. ______ is my friend.
questions.explanation: 第一空后有名name，用形容词性物主代词His；第二空作主语，用人称代词主格He。

questions.question: 53. —Jim, ______ is Sonia. ______ is my good friend. —Nice to meet you, Sonia!
questions.explanation: 介绍他人时常用This is...；第二空指代Sonia，用人称代词主格She。

questions.source: 2024陕西西安碑林区三中联合体期中
questions.question: 54. Bob is my brother. ______ is only 4, but ______ English is very good.
questions.explanation: 第一空作主语，用人称代词主格He；第二空后有名English，用形容词性物主代词his。

questions.source: 2024陕西西安碑林区三中联合体期中
questions.question: 55. I have a dog. ______ name is Wangwang. ______ black.
questions.explanation: 第一空后有名name，用形容词性物主代词Its；第二空是It is的缩写，意为"它是黑色的"。

questions.source: 2024陕西西安碑林区西工大附中月考
questions.question: 56. ______ are students.
questions.explanation: 作主语时用人称代词主格，并列主语中I放在最后，He and I。

questions.source: 2024陕西西安碑林区西工大附中月考
questions.question: 57. She needs to thank ______ for helping her with ______ English.
questions.explanation: thank后接宾语，用宾格you；English前用形容词性物主代词her。

questions.question: 58. —Is Tony his first name? —Yes, ______ is.
questions.explanation: 指代名字、事物时用it。这里it指代Tony这个first name。

questions.question: 59. —Jack, is Ms. Liu ______ English teacher? —Yes. She is very nice. She always helps ______ with my English.
questions.explanation: 第一空后有名English teacher，用形容词性物主代词your；第二空作helps的宾语，用宾格me。

questions.question: 60. —Where is my hat, Mom? —It is in your ______ room.
questions.explanation: 表示"祖父母的房间"，grandparents是复数，以s结尾，所有格加'。

questions.question: 61. —Does your brother ______ breakfast at home? —No, he ______.
questions.explanation: Does后接动词原形，第一空用eat；否定回答用No, he doesn't。

questions.question: 62. —There ______ a skirt and two coats on the chair. Are these yours? —No, they are not mine.
questions.explanation: there be句型遵循就近原则，a skirt是单数，故用is。

questions.source: 2024湖南岳阳云溪区八校期中联考
questions.question: 63. There ______ a set of keys on the chair.
questions.explanation: a set of keys意为"一串钥匙"，主语是a set，单数，故用is。

questions.question: 64. —Does Jack ______ a TV? —Yes, he often watches sports programs on ______ TV.
questions.explanation: Does后接动词原形，第一空用have；on TV是固定短语，不加冠词。

questions.source: 2024河北石家庄外国语教育集团期中
questions.question: 65. —Here are some pencils on the floor. Are these yours? —______. They're Tom's.
questions.explanation: 根据后文"它们是汤姆的"可知是否定回答；回答Are these...时，用they代替these。

questions.question: 66. —______ is Mr Wang's coat? —Black.
questions.explanation: 根据答语Black（黑色）可知，问句询问颜色，用What colour。

questions.question: 67. 下列字母音标都含有/eɪ/音的一组字母为______。
questions.explanation: Aa /eɪ/、Kk /keɪ/、Hh /eɪtʃ/ 都含有/eɪ/音。A项Dd /diː/、Cc /siː/、Ff /ef/ 不含/eɪ/；C项Ll /el/、Mm /em/、Ff /ef/ 不含/eɪ/；D项Ii /aɪ/、Oo /əʊ/、Qq /kjuː/ 不含/eɪ/。

questions.source: 2024湖南岳阳云溪区八校期中联考
questions.question: 68. 下面含有与字母 Ee 相同音素的一组字母是______。
questions.explanation: 字母Ee发/iː/，但常见考点中Ee与Bb、Cc、Dd、Gg、Pp、Tt、Vv等含有相同的元音音素/iː/。Ss /es/ 和 Xx /eks/ 都含有/e/音，与Ee的发音/e/部分相同。A项正确。

questions.question: 69. 下列单词画线部分发音为/ʌ/的是______。
questions.explanation: mother /ˈmʌðə(r)/、love /lʌv/、son /sʌn/ 都发/ʌ/。A项not /nɒt/、box /bɒks/ 发/ɒ/，son发/ʌ/；B项dog /dɒɡ/、lost /lɒst/、box /bɒks/ 都发/ɒ/；D项no /nəʊ/、not /nɒt/、old /əʊld/ 发/əʊ/和/ɒ/。

questions.question: 70. ______ Bill ______ two ping-pong balls?
questions.explanation: 主语Bill是第三人称单数，助动词用Does，后接动词原形have。

questions.question: 71. —Who is the woman? —She is my ______, my mother's sister.
questions.explanation: my mother's sister意为"我妈妈的姐妹"，即aunt（姨母/姑母）。

questions.question: 72. Li Hua sits ______ me so I can't see the blackboard clearly.
questions.explanation: 根据语境"我看不清黑板"，说明李华坐在我前面挡住了视线。in front of意为"在……前面"。

questions.question: 73. —Is there ______ bread on the dish? —Yes, there is ______.
questions.explanation: 一般疑问句中通常用any；肯定回答中用some。

questions.question: 74. It's 10:00 a.m. now, boys and girls. It's time for us ______ morning ______.
questions.explanation: It's time for sb. to do sth. 意为"到某人做某事的时间了"，第一空用to do；morning exercises意为"早操"，用复数形式exercises。

questions.question: 75. Your schoolbag is ______ mine. I don't know which one to take.
questions.explanation: 根据后文"我不知道拿哪一个"，说明两个书包很相似，用similar to（与……相似）。different from意为"与……不同"；the same as意为"与……相同"，C项搭配错误。

questions.question: 76. 下面各组字母中,含有相同元音音素的一组是______。
questions.explanation: Bb /biː/、Cc /siː/、Gg /dʒiː/ 都含有/iː/音。B项Ff /ef/、Mm /em/、Jj /dʒeɪ/ 元音不同；C项Aa /eɪ/、Hh /eɪtʃ/、Vv /viː/ 元音不同；D项Qq /kjuː/、Uu /juː/、Oo /əʊ/ 元音不同。

questions.question: 77. —Do you know ______ girl with long hair? —Yes, she is Mary. She plays ______ tennis very well.
questions.explanation: 第一空特指"长头发的女孩"，用定冠词the；球类运动前不加冠词，play tennis。

questions.source: 2024四川成都嘉祥外国语学校期中
questions.question: 78. This Chinese boy is in ______ now.
questions.explanation: 英语中表达班级年级时，先说班级再说年级，且Class和Grade首字母大写，数字用大写或阿拉伯数字。正确顺序：Class 2, Grade 7。

questions.question: 79. —Thank you very much for your call! —______
questions.explanation: 当别人说Thank you时，应该用You're welcome（不客气）来回应。

questions.source: 2024广西南宁天桃实验学校期中
questions.question: 80. —How old are you? —______
questions.explanation: How old are you? 询问年龄，回答用I'm + 数字，或I'm + 数字 + years old。C项I'm nine是简略正确回答。

questions.source: 2024黑龙江大庆外国语学校期中
questions.question: 81. ______ mother works in a hospital and she is an excellent doctor.
questions.explanation: 根据语境，mother是单数，表示两人共同的母亲，只在最后一个人名后加's，即Linda and Anna's。

questions.source: 2024浙江温州瓯海区实验中学期中
questions.question: 82. My home is ______ my school. I always go to school on foot.
questions.explanation: 根据后文"我总是步行上学"，说明家离学校很近，用next to（紧邻）。far from意为"远离"，与步行上学矛盾；in the front of意为"在……前部"。

questions.question: 83. We don't have ______ apples, but we have ______ apple juice.
questions.explanation: 否定句中用any表示"一些"；肯定句中用some表示"一些"。apple juice是不可数名词。

questions.question: 84. —______ bags of rice do you want? —I'd like eleven bags.
questions.explanation: bags of rice是可数名词复数，用How many询问数量。How much修饰不可数名词；How old询问年龄；How heavy询问重量。

questions.question: 85. —______ is the library? —It's next to the classroom.
questions.explanation: 根据答语"It's next to the classroom."（它在教室旁边）可知，问句询问地点，应用Where提问。

questions.question: 86. 选出画线部分发音与众不同的选项。
questions.explanation: near /nɪə(r)/、hear /hɪə(r)/、dear /dɪə(r)/ 都发/ɪə/；wear /weə(r)/ 发/eə/。B项发音与其他三项不同。

tags: it's nice of sb to do
questions.question: 87. It's nice of you ______ me ______ my English.
questions.explanation: It's nice of sb. to do sth. 意为"某人做某事真好"，第一空用to help；help sb. with sth. 意为"在某方面帮助某人"，是固定搭配。

questions.source: 2023云南昆明八中长城红鑫校区模拟
questions.question: 88. Ms. Wang helped me ______ the difficult physics problem at last.
questions.explanation: work out意为"解决、算出"，符合语境"解决难题"。carry out意为"执行"；look out意为"当心"；bring out意为"出版、使显现"。

questions.question: 89. —I have a brother ______ a sister. What about you? —I have a brother, ______ I don't have a sister.
questions.explanation: 第一空表示并列关系"和"，用and；第二空表示转折关系"但是"，用but。

questions.question: 90. —Grandma Lee is quite ______ these kids. —Yeah! She is ______ telling stories and all the children like her a lot.
questions.explanation: be good with sb. 意为"善于与某人相处"；be good at doing sth. 意为"擅长做某事"。第一空指与孩子相处好，用good with；第二空指擅长讲故事，用good at。

questions.question: 91. My uncle is interested in ______.
questions.explanation: be interested in doing sth. 是固定搭配，意为"对做某事感兴趣"，介词in后接动名词fishing。

questions.question: 92. —What do you like doing in your free time? —I like collecting stamps, and I have more than 100 stamps. (选出可以替代画线部分的单词)
questions.explanation: more than意为"超过"，与over意思相近。under意为"在……下面"或"少于"；about意为"大约"。

questions.question: 93. —Do you like Beijing? —Of course. I ______ it as soon as I arrived there.
questions.explanation: 根据语境"一到那里就喜欢上北京"，用fell in love with（爱上）。came up with意为"提出"；ran out of意为"用完"；took care of意为"照顾"。

questions.question: 94. Which sign means that you can't take a photo here?
questions.explanation: 禁止拍照的标识通常是相机图标上画斜线。根据常见标识，A项为禁止拍照标识。

questions.question: 95. Though Daisy is only 3 years old, she is able to read and write. (选出与句子画线部分意思相同或相近的选项)
questions.explanation: be able to意为"能够"，与can意思相同。should意为"应该"；must意为"必须"；may意为"可能"。

questions.question: 96. —Do you have ______ pens?  —Yes. One for my son, two for my daughter and two for their cousin.
questions.explanation: one + two + two = five，共五支笔。

questions.question: 97. I like to read the book Journey to the West, because there are many ______ things in it.
questions.explanation: 《西游记》中有很多有趣的事情，因此用interesting。

questions.source: 2023 湖南资兴东坪学校期末
questions.question: 98. ______ is Qingdao? —It’s in Shandong.
questions.explanation: 根据回答"在山东"可知，询问地点，用Where。

questions.question: 99. —Why do you like English? —Because it’s useful ______ interesting.
questions.explanation: useful和interesting之间是并列关系，表示“有用且有趣”，因此用and。

questions.question: 100. Math is interesting, ______ it’s difficult.
questions.explanation: interesting和difficult之间是转折关系，表示“数学有趣，但是很难”，因此用but。

questions.question: 101. —What do you think of geography? —It’s difficult but ______ I like it.
questions.explanation: 根据语境“difficult but... I like it”，尽管难但喜欢，说明地理是有用的，useful符合句意。

questions.source: 2024 黑龙江哈尔滨四十七中月考
questions.question: 102. —______ club do you want to join? —Well, I like sports, so I want to join the ______ club.
questions.explanation: 询问“哪一个俱乐部”用Which club；根据“I like sports”可知想加入体育俱乐部。

questions.question: 103. —Can Cindy play chess? —______. But she can play the guitar.
questions.explanation: 问句以Can开头，回答用can；根据“But she can play the guitar”可知她不会下棋，用否定回答No, she can’t。

questions.question: 104. My grandmother often goes to bed ______ the evening.
questions.explanation: in the evening为固定搭配，表示“在晚上”。go to bed in the evening意为“晚上睡觉”。

questions.question: 105. —What’s the time now? —It’s ______.
questions.explanation: 根据图片中的时钟显示，时针指向12过一点，分针指向9，表示12:45，即a quarter to one（差一刻到一点）。

questions.source: 2024 甘肃泰安兴国中学期中
questions.question: 106. —______, Mike? —It’s half past eight. It’s time for class.
questions.explanation: 根据回答“It’s half past eight”可知询问的是具体时间，用What time is it。

questions.question: 107. Because of the "double reduction" policy, students can ______ their free time to develop their hobbies.
questions.explanation: make full use of意为“充分利用”；根据语境“双减政策下，学生可以利用空闲时间发展爱好”，用make full use of。

questions.source: 2024 黑龙江哈尔滨四十七中月考
questions.question: 108. —______ does it take from your classroom to your school’s library? —My school’s library is one kilometer away from my classroom. So it takes me about 10 minutes to get there on foot.
questions.explanation: 问句中用了“does it take”，询问花费多长时间，用How long。

questions.source: 2023 广西东兰县民族中学期末
questions.question: 109. —______ is your new skirt? —It’s 40 yuan.
questions.explanation: 根据回答“40 yuan”可知询问价格，用How much。

questions.source: 2023 山东泰安东岳中学期末
questions.question: 110. This T-shirt is very cool. I’ll ______ it.
questions.explanation: 在购物场景中，I’ll take it意为“我买了”，表示决定购买。

questions.source: 2024 吉林松原前郭一中期末
questions.question: 111. —Can I help you? —______.
questions.explanation: Can I help you?是购物场景中售货员的常用语，顾客通常回答Yes, I want...或直接说明想买的东西。

questions.source: 2024 四川成都嘉祥外国语学校月考
questions.question: 112. —What’s the date today? —______.
questions.explanation: What’s the date?询问日期，回答应为具体月日。

questions.question: 113. —______? —Yes, please. I want a basketball.
questions.explanation: 根据回答“Yes, please. I want a basketball.”可知，问句是购物场景中售货员的常用语Can I help you?

questions.question: 114. —______ is the red shirt? —It’s 50 yuan.
questions.explanation: 根据回答“50 yuan”可知询问价格，用How much。

questions.question: 115. —______ is a boat ticket for children? —How old is your child? It’s free for kids under three years old.
questions.explanation: 根据回答“It’s free”可知询问价格，用How much。

questions.source: 2023 山东泰安东岳中学期末
questions.question: 116. —The yellow socks look nice. ______ are they? —They’re only 2 yuan.
questions.explanation: 根据回答“2 yuan”可知询问价格，用How much。

questions.question: 117. Some people have a lot of money, ______ they aren’t happy.
questions.explanation: 前后句表示转折关系，有钱但不快乐，用but。

questions.source: 2023 山东济南济阳区垛石中学期末
questions.question: 118. —What is your favorite fruit, Anna? —Apples. ______ I always have one apple in the morning.
questions.explanation: 因为喜欢苹果，所以每天早上吃一个，前后构成因果关系，用So。

questions.question: 119. My bedroom is very small, ______ it is tidy.
questions.explanation: small和tidy之间是转折关系，房间虽小但整洁，用but。

questions.question: 120. English is a little difficult for me, ______ I really like it.
questions.explanation: difficult和like之间是转折关系，英语虽然难但喜欢，用but。

questions.source: 2023 山东临沂河东区育杰学校期末
questions.question: 121. —______ do you have P.E.? —On Tuesday.
questions.explanation: 根据回答“On Tuesday”可知询问时间，用When。

questions.question: 122. —Dad, I can’t find my notebooks! ______ are they? —They are on the sofa.
questions.explanation: 根据回答“on the sofa”可知询问地点，用Where。

questions.question: 123. —Who’s the girl in red? —______
questions.explanation: 问句询问“穿红衣服的女孩是谁？”，回答应说明身份，She is my classmate符合。

questions.question: 124. —______ does he like blue? —Because the color makes him happy.
questions.explanation: 根据回答“Because...”可知询问原因，用Why。

questions.question: 125. —______ the boy over there? —Oh, that’s Jimmy.
questions.explanation: 根据回答“that’s Jimmy”可知询问“那个男孩是谁”，用Who’s。

questions.question: 126. Jimmy is short, ______ his brother is tall and strong.
questions.explanation: short和tall and strong之间是转折关系，用but。

questions.question: 127. —______ you go skating with me this Saturday, Mary? —I’m afraid I ______. I’ll help my old neighbor fix his washing machine that day.
questions.explanation: 询问“这周六能否去滑冰”，用Can/Could均可；根据“I’m afraid”可知是否定回答，用can’t。

questions.question: 128. —______ you play soccer? —Yes, I ______. But I don’t have a soccer ball.
questions.explanation: 问句询问“你会踢足球吗？”，用Can开头；回答Yes, I can表示“会”。

questions.question: 129. —______ is it from the hotel to the park? —It’s fifteen kilometers, about 40 minutes by bus.
questions.explanation: 根据回答“fifteen kilometers”可知询问距离，用How far。How long询问时间长度，How询问方式或程度。

questions.question: 130. —Jenny, your hat is very nice. ______ is it? —It’s only twenty yuan.
questions.explanation: 根据回答“twenty yuan”可知询问价格，用How much。

questions.source: 2024 黑龙江大庆外国语学校期末
questions.question: 131. There ______ some orange juice and many ______ on the table.
questions.explanation: There be句型遵循就近原则，orange juice为不可数名词，be动词用is；many修饰可数名词复数，orange作为“橘子”是可数名词，用oranges。

questions.question: 132. —What can you do for these children? —I think I can help them ______ English.
questions.explanation: help sb with sth为固定搭配，意为“帮助某人做某事”，help them with English意为“帮助他们学英语”。

questions.question: 133. —What do you think of math? —For me it is difficult ______ interesting.
questions.explanation: difficult和interesting之间是转折关系，表示“虽然难但有趣”，用but。

questions.source: 2024 广东广州越秀区铁一中学月考
questions.question: 134. —Does Joe ______ a tennis ball? —No, he doesn’t. But he ______ a baseball.
questions.explanation: Does后接动词原形，用have；主语he为第三人称单数，谓语动词用has。

questions.question: 135. Lisa likes reading and she ______ much money on books.
questions.explanation: spend money on sth为固定搭配，意为“在某事上花钱”。take意为“花费时间”，buy意为“买”，share意为“分享”。

questions.question: 136. Lily is in front of Sam, so Sam is ______ Lily.
questions.explanation: Lily在Sam的前面，那么Sam就在Lily的后面，behind意为“在……后面”。

questions.source: 2024 黑龙江哈尔滨六十九中月考
questions.question: 137. Tom is ______ in science. He wants ______ a scientist in the future.
questions.explanation: be interested in意为“对……感兴趣”；want to do sth意为“想要做某事”，want to be意为“想要成为”。

questions.question: 138. Look! ______ room is very ______.
questions.explanation: room为单数，表示两人共同拥有的房间，用Tom and Jim’s；根据语境“Look!”可知房间很整洁或漂亮，nice符合。
